violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Replace clean dish storage rack. Is dirty and cracked.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Paint or stain wood box below pizza oven.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Equipment/utensil was not air-dried or allowed adequate draining after sanitizing. -Tubs with towel in bottom does not allow proper air-drying.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Clean floors on ice machine, handwash, dishwash areas.
